description: Evaluation cases for ODD+2 narrative documentation skill

evals.prompt: I have a Python ABM with simple Agent and Environment classes. Generate an ODD+2 narrative for my model.
evals.expected_output: ODD sections covering entities, state variables, processes, stochasticity (if any), parameters, and initialization logic

evals.prompt: Create a timeline for documenting my project milestones
I'm preparing a paper on an agent-based forest fire model. I need publication-ready ODD narrative.
My model code has no docstrings. Can the ODD skill still help?
Generate documentation for my API endpoints
I have a NetLogo predator-prey model. Can you structure it using the ODD protocol for a paper?
Help me formalize my simulation model description using standard ABM documentation practices
Write a README file for my GitHub repository
Explain what the ODD protocol is and why it's used
Here is my draft ODD description. Improve clarity, fix structure, and ensure it meets ODD+2 standards.
Validate this ODD description against the ODD+2 checklist and tell me what's missing.
Document my system dynamics model using standard modeling documentation practices
Summarize my simulation model in plain English for a blog post
Explain the ODD protocol briefly for a presentation slide
Document my simulation model for a paper
evals.expected_output: Does not trigger without ABM specificity

evals.prompt: I need a structured description of agents, their behaviors, and environment interactions for publication
Write documentation for my discrete-event simulation model
Generate an ODD description for my model (details not provided)
Convert my model description into a README with sections
List the entities and variables in my agent-based model
Fix grammar in my ODD description
Summarize my ABM and optionally format it using ODD if useful
Help me structure a formal agent-based model description using standard protocols
Write a UML diagram description for my agent-based model
Generate FAIR metadata for my model repository
